figura.error.internal.unexpected: Unexpected internal error in Figura. Check your log to find the error stacktrace, and please report this to the devs so we can add a better error message!
figura.error.internal.general: Unexpected internal error in Figura: [%s]. Please report this to the devs so we can fix it!
figura.error.internal.escaper: This message should not appear - it's meant to only be used internally. If you find it, please report to devs!
figura.error.importing.no_avatar_json: Folder does not have an "avatar.json" file.
figura.error.importing.invalid_figmodel: Failed to parse model "%s.figmodel". Likely a bug in the exporter or importer, please report!
figura.error.importing.scripts.no_langua: To use scripts, you must set the "language" field in avatar.json. For example, "language": "lua"
figura.error.importing.scripts.unknown_l: Unrecognized script language in avatar.json: "%s". For now, "lua" is the only supported language.
figura.error.importing.scripts.lua.no_ma: For a module with language = "lua", you must have a file "scripts/main.lua".
figura.error.importing.metadata.dependen: The "dependencies" field in metadata json must be an object mapping strings to strings.
figura.error.loading.invalid_png: Failed to process texture "%s". Are you sure this is a valid PNG file?
figura.error.loading.script.unknown_lang: Unknown language "%s". Currently the only supported language is "lua".
